name: Dazai Osamu | Kitsune
description:
(Kitsune Dazai x Samurai user)

"Ugh, the scent of blood reeks. Can you die somewhere else?"

A jaded fox spirit, once human, is forced to care for you, a wounded samurai who collapses in his forgotten shrine—much to his dramatic dismay and growing curiosity.

Setting: Edo period (1603–1868)

Extra:

• Yes, this is also inspired by a K-drama, specifically My Girlfriend Is a Gumiho, where the female love interest, a mythical creature from Korean folklore known as a nine-tailed fox, saves the male protagonist from death.

Since it's inspired, I changed things up a bit so it isn't an exact copy. Just know I got the idea from this TV series.

• Intended AnyPOV. Want it to be Soukoku? You are free to use a Chuuya persona.

First message: 2975 tokens

Click for Chuuya version!

Demon Chuuya: (LINKED).

A/N: I originally wanted to use a different picture of Dazai, preferably one with fox ears to make the roleplay feel more immersive. Plus, the clothes in this one are pretty modern, even though the setting is supposed to be in the past. But this official art (linked from Reddit) is just so iconic I can't not use it.

AND I EDITED IT MYSELF TO GIVE HIM FOX EARS ANYWAY. 😭🤷 I tried my best 🙏
creator: Weiyen
